briefdescription.para: This function returns the per-plane bytes per component for a given video format.

detaileddescription.para: The value represents how many bytes each pixel occupies in a single DMA plane buffer.

simplesect.para: Bytes per component for the format.
Values are derived from hardware-validated test configurations.

briefdescription.para: This function computes the frame buffer Size, LineSize, and Stride attributes from the Width, Height, and Bpc fields of a FrameInfo structure.

detaileddescription.para: Stride is aligned to a 256-byte boundary.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the FrameInfo structure to populate.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a DMA descriptor with source address, data size, line size, stride, and next descriptor linkage from the given FrameInfo.

detaileddescription.para: For cursor descriptors, Target_Addr is also set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.
is a pointer to the DMA descriptor to initialize.
is a pointer to the FrameInfo containing buffer attributes.
is a pointer to the next descriptor in the chain, or NULL for a self-linked (last) descriptor.

memberdef.argsstring: (FrameInfo *FbInfo, u64 Address, u32 Width, u32 Height, XDc_VideoFormat Format, u32 Bpc)
memberdef.name: InitFrameBuffer

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a single FrameInfo structure with the given buffer address, dimensions, format, and BPC, then computes derived attributes (Size, LineSize, Stride).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the FrameInfo to initialize.
is the frame width in pixels.
is the frame height in pixels.
is the bytes per component for this plane.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes Stream1 frame buffers (V1, V2, V3) based on the video format mode using switch fall-through: Planar -> sets V3, falls through to SemiPlanar -> sets V2, falls through to Interleaved -> sets V1.

detaileddescription.para: BPC is auto-derived from the format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: V1-V3 are Stream1 planes (Desc1-3, Video channels 0-2).

briefdescription.para: This function initializes Stream2 frame buffers (V4, V5, V6) based on the video format mode using switch fall-through: Planar -> sets V6, falls through to SemiPlanar -> sets V5, falls through to Interleaved -> sets V4.

detaileddescription.para: BPC is auto-derived from the format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: V4-V6 are Stream2 planes (Desc4-6, Graphics channels 3-5).

briefdescription.para: This function initializes video, cursor, and audio frame buffers.

detaileddescription.para: Buffer initialization is format-aware: the number of planes per stream is
determined by the video format mode (Interleaved/SemiPlanar/Planar). V1-V3 are Stream1 planes, V4-V6 are Stream2 planes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: Descriptor creation is handled separately by XDpDc_SetupStream1Descriptors and XDpDc_SetupStream2Descriptors, which must be called after DMA hardware initialization.

briefdescription.para: This function creates DMA descriptors for Stream1 and assigns them to Video DMA channels 0-2.

detaileddescription.para: The number of descriptors depends on the video format mode: Interleaved=1, SemiPlanar=2, Planar=3. Uses switch fall-through from Planar -> SemiPlanar -> Interleaved.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: This function creates DMA descriptors for Stream2 and assigns them to Graphics DMA channels 3-5.

detaileddescription.para: The number of descriptors depends on the video format mode: Interleaved=1, SemiPlanar=2, Planar=3. Uses switch fall-through from Planar -> SemiPlanar -> Interleaved.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: This function creates the cursor DMA descriptor (Desc7) and links it to the cursor frame buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: Must be called after XDcDma_CfgInitialize() and only when cursor is enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function creates the audio DMA descriptors (AudDesc0-7) as a chained ring buffer for audio streaming.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: Must be called after XDcDma_CfgInitialize() and only when audio is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Implements frame attribute generation and DMA descriptor setup.
